candidates.why: Balance sheet cash line; best available match for cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow statement ending cash balance, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.
Cash flow statement balance, but not the balance sheet cash line.

candidates.row_label: Exchange gains/losses on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a stock of cash.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet cash line. Although phrased as 'Cash' rather than 'Cash and cash equivalents', it is the appropriate balance sheet cash measure available.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

candidates.why: Appears within current liabilities section and is the cleanest reported current debt line; excludes leases because lease liabilities are listed separately.
Could represent current portion of debt, but may overlap with current loans and borrowings and risks double counting.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current lease debt, but lease liabilities should be excluded from STD baseline.
Explicit lease liabilities and should be excluded from STD.

variables.notes: Chose the 'Loans and borrowings' line located in the current liabilities section as the clean current debt total. Excluded lease liabilities per rule and avoided adding 'Debt due within one year' to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable line on the balance sheet.
Exact balance sheet PPE line and preferred total/net PPE measure.
Gross supplemental line appears blank in preview and net reported PPE is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex, not balance sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported PPE line; preferred over gross or balancing lines.
